medialive.input.inputvpcrequest.Security.Description: The list of up to five VPC security group IDs to attach to the input VPC network interfaces. The security groups require subnet IDs. If none are specified, MediaLive uses the VPC default security group.

medialive.input.inputvpcrequest.SubnetId.Description: The list of two VPC subnet IDs from the same VPC. You must associate subnet IDs to two unique Availability Zones.
